tags.name: Barton Gate
tags.note: Gate now fitted with an electronic lock with keypad and RFID card reader for holders of an annual pass to Cirencester Park. This is not yet activated (16/03/2024).
Open daily from 8am to 5pm, but in the winter the park closes at 4:15pm
